description: A standing golden figure of the Buddha amid a lush, dreamlike environment of flowers and trees. The Buddha is rendered in warm golden and amber tones, wearing flowing robes, standing upright with a serene expression. Surrounding the figure are dense clusters of flowers — pink, red, and white — and dark tree branches. The palette is warm and rich, dominated by golds, browns, reds, and greens. The style is characteristically Symbolist, with a soft, atmospheric quality that blurs the boundary between figure and landscape. Pink lotus-like flowers appear at the feet.
